docs.title: 2D Coordinates
docs.text:
2D drawing uses a top-left origin.

  • (0, 0) is the top-left of the window
  • x grows to the right
  • y grows downward
  • Rect.new(x, y, width, height) treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left
  • Graphics.drawRect and Graphics.drawImage draw from the Rect top-left
  • Graphics.drawText uses the top-left of the rendered text as position

Use the Pivot overload of Rect.new when you want to construct a rectangle from another anchor such as the center or bottom-right.

local rect = sn.Rect.new(sn.Pivot.Center, sn.Vec2.new(400, 300), sn.Vec2.new(120, 80))
sn.Graphics.drawRect(rect, sn.Color.new(1, 1, 1, 1))

2D drawing can also be scoped with an explicit Camera2D. Without begin2D, or after finish(), 2D drawing uses the window as the implicit camera.

local uiCamera = sn.Camera2D.new()
uiCamera:resize(sn.Vec2.new(1280, 720))

sn.Graphics.begin2D(uiCamera)
sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: 3D Passes
docs.text:
3D drawing is scoped by an explicit camera pass. Call Graphics.begin3D(camera), issue 3D draw calls, then call Graphics.finish() before returning to implicit 2D drawing.

local camera = sn.Camera3D.new()
camera:lookat(sn.Vec3.new(1, 1, 3), sn.Vec3.new(0), sn.Vec3.new(0, 1, 0))

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))

docs.title: Procedural 3D Models
docs.text:
sn.MeshBuilder lets Luau assemble vertices, triangles, and primitive shapes, then convert the result into a Model. The vertex ids returned by vertex() are 1-based for Luau code.

local builder = sn.MeshBuilder.new()
builder:addSphere(1.0, 16, 32, sn.Color.new(0.9, 0.4, 0.2, 1.0))

local model = builder:toModel()
local transform = sn.Transform.new()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: Immediate GUI
docs.text:
sn.Gui provides a small immediate-mode GUI layer. Call widgets every frame from draw(); each widget draws itself and returns its new interaction state.

local enabled = false
local volume = 0.5

function draw()
    if sn.Gui.button("Play", sn.Rect.new(20, 20, 120, 32)) then
        print("clicked")
    end

    enabled = sn.Gui.checkbox("Enabled", enabled, sn.Rect.new(20, 64, 160, 28))
    volume = sn.Gui.sliderFloat("Volume", volume, 0.0, 1.0, sn.Rect.new(20, 104, 240, 28))
end

For scrollable lists, keep the scroll offset in Luau and update it with the value returned by scrollVertical().

local scrollY = 0.0
local viewport = sn.Rect.new(20, 80, 360, 480)

function draw()
    scrollY = sn.Gui.scrollVertical(scrollY, viewport, 900, 48)
end

docs.title: Video API
docs.text:
sn.VideoWriter and sn.VideoReader write and read video files. The current implementation uses a simple AVI container without an external codec dependency.

local writer = sn.VideoWriter.new()
if writer:open("capture.avi", 640, 360, 30) then
    -- pixels is an RGB8/RGBA8/BGR8/BGRA8 sn.Buffer
    writer:addFrame(pixels, 640, 360, "rgba8", 90)
    writer:close()
end

local reader = sn.VideoReader.new()
if reader:open("capture.avi") then
    local info = reader:info()
    local frame = reader:readFrame(0)
    reader:close()
end

docs.title: Sinen Tutorial
docs.text: This page explains the fastest way to run a Luau app with Sinen.

docs.title: 1. Core Ideas
docs.text:
Sinen is based on three simple rules:

  • Run main.luau as the entry script
  • Split logic into setup, update, and draw
  • Place assets under the runtime base directory

2D drawing uses Processing/raylib-style coordinates. sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) is the top-left of the screen, x grows to the right, and y grows downward. sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) also treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left corner.

Here is the minimum script:

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- Move to another scene if needed
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

docs.title: Windows (this repository layout)
docs.text:
1. Build from the project root
build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat
build\build_msvc2026-debug.bat
  1. Move to your project directory and run
cd examples\01_helloworld
..\..\build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe

main.luau will be loaded.

You can also run a .sna archive. A .sna file is a zip archive whose root contains a sna/ directory with main.luau and its assets inside.

hoge.sna
└─ sna
   ├─ main.luau
   └─ logo.png

build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe hoge.sna

docs.title: Android
docs.text:
• build\generate_android.bat
  • build\build_android.bat
  • Open build/android in Android Studio and run
  • Place your assets under /sdcard/Android/media/astomih.sinen.app

docs.title: 3. Lifecycle
docs.text:
• setup(): called once when a scene is loaded; use it for loading textures/models
  • update(): called every frame; use it for input, game logic, and physics
  • draw(): called every frame for rendering

setup is optional. update and draw are enough to run.

docs.title: 4. Draw an Image
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local image: sn.Texture = sn.Texture.new()

function setup()
    image:load("logo.png")
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawImage(image, sn.Rect.new(20, 20, image:size().x, image:size().y))
end

docs.title: 5. Input and Sound
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local se: sn.Sound = sn.Sound.new()

function setup()
    se:load("shot.wav")
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.SPACE) then
        se:play()
    end
end

docs.title: 6. Scene Switching
docs.text:
Use sn.Script.load(filePath, baseDirPath) to switch scenes.

  • filePath: script name without extension (for example, main)
  • baseDirPath: base directory of that scene

Example: switch to scenes/title/main.luau

sn.Script.load("main", "scenes/title")

docs.title: 7. Example Directory Layout
docs.text:
my_game/
  main.luau
  player.luau
  logo.png
  shot.wav
  scenes/
    title/
      main.luau

For modules in the same directory, use normal require.

local Player = require("./player")

docs.title: 8. Next Examples to Read
docs.text:
• examples/01_helloworld: minimal setup
  • examples/02_texture: image drawing
  • examples/03_model: 3D model drawing
  • examples/04_sound: sound playback
  • examples/09_physics: physics
  • examples/14_synth: synth

For the full API, see docs/en/luau_api.md.

docs.title: Sinen Tutorial
docs.text: This page explains the fastest way to run a Luau app with Sinen.

docs.title: 1. Core Ideas
docs.text:
Sinen is based on three simple rules:

  • Run main.luau as the entry script
  • Split logic into setup, update, and draw
  • Place assets under the runtime base directory

2D drawing uses Processing/raylib-style coordinates. sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) is the top-left of the screen, x grows to the right, and y grows downward. sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) also treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left corner.

Here is the minimum script:

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- Move to another scene if needed
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat

docs.title: 概要
docs.text: Sinenはクリエイティブコーディングのためのフレームワークです。

docs.title: コミュニティ
docs.text: Discord

docs.title: 2D 座標
docs.text:
2D 描画は左上原点です。

  • (0, 0) はウィンドウの左上
  • x は右方向に増加
  • y は下方向に増加
  • Rect.new(x, y, width, height) の x, y は矩形の左上
  • Graphics.drawRect / Graphics.drawImage は Rect の左上を基準に描画
  • Graphics.drawText の position は描画される文字列の左上

中心や右下など別の基準点から矩形を作りたい場合は Pivot 付きの Rect.new を使います。

local rect = sn.Rect.new(sn.Pivot.Center, sn.Vec2.new(400, 300), sn.Vec2.new(120, 80))
sn.Graphics.drawRect(rect, sn.Color.new(1, 1, 1, 1))

2D 描画も明示的な Camera2D で scoped pass にできます。begin2D を使わない場合、または finish() 後は、ウィンドウが暗黙の 2D カメラとして使われます。

local uiCamera = sn.Camera2D.new()
uiCamera:resize(sn.Vec2.new(1280, 720))

sn.Graphics.begin2D(uiCamera)
sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: 3D Pass
docs.text:
3D 描画は明示的なカメラ pass で囲みます。Graphics.begin3D(camera) の後に 3D 描画を発行し、2D の暗黙描画へ戻る前に Graphics.finish() を呼びます。

local camera = sn.Camera3D.new()
camera:lookat(sn.Vec3.new(1, 1, 3), sn.Vec3.new(0), sn.Vec3.new(0, 1, 0))

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))

docs.title: プロシージャル 3D モデル
docs.text:
sn.MeshBuilder は Luau から頂点・三角形・基本形状を組み立て、Model に変換できます。vertex() が返す頂点番号は Luau 側に合わせて 1 始まりです。

local builder = sn.MeshBuilder.new()
builder:addSphere(1.0, 16, 32, sn.Color.new(0.9, 0.4, 0.2, 1.0))

local model = builder:toModel()
local transform = sn.Transform.new()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: Immediate GUI
docs.text:
sn.Gui は小さな immediate-mode GUI レイヤーです。draw() から毎フレーム widget を呼ぶと、その場で描画され、新しい入力状態が戻り値で返ります。

local enabled = false
local volume = 0.5

function draw()
    if sn.Gui.button("Play", sn.Rect.new(20, 20, 120, 32)) then
        print("clicked")
    end

    enabled = sn.Gui.checkbox("Enabled", enabled, sn.Rect.new(20, 64, 160, 28))
    volume = sn.Gui.sliderFloat("Volume", volume, 0.0, 1.0, sn.Rect.new(20, 104, 240, 28))
end

スクロールが必要な一覧では、スクロール量を Luau 側で保持し、scrollVertical() の戻り値で更新します。

local scrollY = 0.0
local viewport = sn.Rect.new(20, 80, 360, 480)

function draw()
    scrollY = sn.Gui.scrollVertical(scrollY, viewport, 900, 48)
end

docs.title: Video API
docs.text:
sn.VideoWriter と sn.VideoReader は、動画の書き出しと読み戻しに対応します。現在の実装は外部コーデックに依存しない簡易 AVI コンテナを使います。

local writer = sn.VideoWriter.new()
if writer:open("capture.avi", 640, 360, 30) then
    -- pixels は RGB8/RGBA8/BGR8/BGRA8 の sn.Buffer
    writer:addFrame(pixels, 640, 360, "rgba8", 90)
    writer:close()
end

local reader = sn.VideoReader.new()
if reader:open("capture.avi") then
    local info = reader:info()
    local frame = reader:readFrame(0)
    reader:close()
end

docs.title: Sinenチュートリアル
docs.text: このページでは、Sinen を使って Luau でアプリを動かす最短手順を説明します。

docs.title: 1. まず覚えること
docs.text:
Sinen の基本はこの3つです。

  • main.luau をエントリースクリプトとして実行する
  • setup / update / draw の3関数で処理を分ける
  • アセットは実行時のベースディレクトリ配下に置く

2D 描画の座標は Processing や raylib と同じく左上原点です。sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) は画面左上、x は右方向、y は下方向に増えます。sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) の x, y も矩形の左上です。

最小コードは次のとおりです。

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- 必要なら別シーンへ遷移
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

docs.title: Windows (このリポジトリの構成)
docs.text:
1. ルートでビルド
build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat
build\build_msvc2026-debug.bat
  1. プロジェクトディレクトリへ移動して実行
cd examples\01_helloworld
..\..\build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe

main.luau が読み込まれます。

.sna アーカイブを渡して実行することもできます。.sna は zip 形式で、 zip 直下に sna/ フォルダを置き、その中に main.luau とアセットを配置します。

hoge.sna
└─ sna
   ├─ main.luau
   └─ logo.png

build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe hoge.sna

docs.title: Android
docs.text:
• build\generate_android.bat
  • build\build_android.bat
  • build/android を Android Studio で開いて実行
  • アセット一式を /sdcard/Android/media/astomih.sinen.app に配置

docs.title: 3. ライフサイクル
docs.text:
• setup(): シーン読込時に1回。テクスチャやモデルのロードに使う
  • update(): 毎フレーム更新。入力・ゲームロジック・物理更新に使う
  • draw(): 毎フレーム描画

setup は省略可能です。update / draw だけでも動作します。

docs.title: 4. 画像を描く
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local image: sn.Texture = sn.Texture.new()

function setup()
    image:load("logo.png")
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawImage(image, sn.Rect.new(20, 20, image:size().x, image:size().y))
end

docs.title: 5. 入力とサウンド
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local se: sn.Sound = sn.Sound.new()

function setup()
    se:load("shot.wav")
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.SPACE) then
        se:play()
    end
end

docs.title: 6. シーン遷移
docs.text:
sn.Script.load(filePath, baseDirPath) で遷移できます。

  • filePath: 拡張子なしのスクリプト名（例: main）
  • baseDirPath: そのシーンの基準ディレクトリ

例: scenes/title/main.luau に遷移

sn.Script.load("main", "scenes/title")

docs.title: 7. ディレクトリ構成の例
docs.text:
my_game/
  main.luau
  player.luau
  logo.png
  shot.wav
  scenes/
    title/
      main.luau

同一ディレクトリのモジュールは通常の require で読み込めます。

local Player = require("./player")

docs.title: 8. 次に読むサンプル
docs.text:
• examples/01_helloworld: 最小構成
  • examples/02_texture: 画像表示
  • examples/03_model: 3Dモデル表示
  • examples/04_sound: サウンド再生
  • examples/09_physics: 物理
  • examples/14_synth: シンセ

API 一覧は docs/ja/luau_api.md から参照できます。

docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Sinen is a creative coding framework.

docs.title: Community
docs.text: Discord

docs.title: 2D Coordinates
docs.text:
2D drawing uses a top-left origin.

  • (0, 0) is the top-left of the window
  • x grows to the right
  • y grows downward
  • Rect.new(x, y, width, height) treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left
  • Graphics.drawRect and Graphics.drawImage draw from the Rect top-left
  • Graphics.drawText uses the top-left of the rendered text as position

local rect = sn.Rect.new(sn.Pivot.Center, sn.Vec2.new(400, 300), sn.Vec2.new(120, 80))

sn.Graphics.begin2D(uiCamera)

sn.Graphics.finish()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)

sn.MeshBuilder lets Luau assemble vertices, triangles, and primitive shapes, then convert the result into a Model. The vertex ids returned by vertex() are 1-based for Luau code.

local builder = sn.MeshBuilder.new()
builder:addSphere(1.0, 16, 32, sn.Color.new(0.9, 0.4, 0.2, 1.0))

local model = builder:toModel()
local transform = sn.Transform.new()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: Immediate GUI
docs.text:
sn.Gui provides a small immediate-mode GUI layer. Call widgets every frame from draw(); each widget draws itself and returns its new interaction state.

local enabled = false
local volume = 0.5

function draw()
    if sn.Gui.button("Play", sn.Rect.new(20, 20, 120, 32)) then
        print("clicked")
    end

    enabled = sn.Gui.checkbox("Enabled", enabled, sn.Rect.new(20, 64, 160, 28))
    volume = sn.Gui.sliderFloat("Volume", volume, 0.0, 1.0, sn.Rect.new(20, 104, 240, 28))
end

For scrollable lists, keep the scroll offset in Luau and update it with the value returned by scrollVertical().

local scrollY = 0.0
local viewport = sn.Rect.new(20, 80, 360, 480)

function draw()
    scrollY = sn.Gui.scrollVertical(scrollY, viewport, 900, 48)
end

docs.title: Video API
docs.text:
sn.VideoWriter and sn.VideoReader write and read video files. The current implementation uses a simple AVI container without an external codec dependency.

local writer = sn.VideoWriter.new()
if writer:open("capture.avi", 640, 360, 30) then
    -- pixels is an RGB8/RGBA8/BGR8/BGRA8 sn.Buffer
    writer:addFrame(pixels, 640, 360, "rgba8", 90)
    writer:close()
end

local reader = sn.VideoReader.new()
if reader:open("capture.avi") then
    local info = reader:info()
    local frame = reader:readFrame(0)
    reader:close()
end

docs.title: Sinen Tutorial
docs.text: This page explains the fastest way to run a Luau app with Sinen.

docs.title: 1. Core Ideas
docs.text:
Sinen is based on three simple rules:

  • Run main.luau as the entry script
  • Split logic into setup, update, and draw
  • Place assets under the runtime base directory

2D drawing uses Processing/raylib-style coordinates. sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) is the top-left of the screen, x grows to the right, and y grows downward. sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) also treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left corner.

Here is the minimum script:

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- Move to another scene if needed
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

docs.title: Windows (this repository layout)
docs.text:
1. Build from the project root
build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat
build\build_msvc2026-debug.bat
  1. Move to your project directory and run
cd examples\01_helloworld
..\..\build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe

main.luau will be loaded.

You can also run a .sna archive. A .sna file is a zip archive whose root contains a sna/ directory with main.luau and its assets inside.

hoge.sna
└─ sna
   ├─ main.luau
   └─ logo.png

build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe hoge.sna

docs.title: Android
docs.text:
• build\generate_android.bat
  • build\build_android.bat
  • Open build/android in Android Studio and run
  • Place your assets under /sdcard/Android/media/astomih.sinen.app

docs.title: 3. Lifecycle
docs.text:
• setup(): called once when a scene is loaded; use it for loading textures/models
  • update(): called every frame; use it for input, game logic, and physics
  • draw(): called every frame for rendering

setup is optional. update and draw are enough to run.

docs.title: 4. Draw an Image
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local image: sn.Texture = sn.Texture.new()

function setup()
    image:load("logo.png")
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawImage(image, sn.Rect.new(20, 20, image:size().x, image:size().y))
end

docs.title: 5. Input and Sound
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local se: sn.Sound = sn.Sound.new()

function setup()
    se:load("shot.wav")
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.SPACE) then
        se:play()
    end
end

docs.title: 6. Scene Switching
docs.text:
Use sn.Script.load(filePath, baseDirPath) to switch scenes.

  • filePath: script name without extension (for example, main)
  • baseDirPath: base directory of that scene

Example: switch to scenes/title/main.luau

sn.Script.load("main", "scenes/title")

docs.title: 7. Example Directory Layout
docs.text:
my_game/
  main.luau
  player.luau
  logo.png
  shot.wav
  scenes/
    title/
      main.luau

For modules in the same directory, use normal require.

local Player = require("./player")

docs.title: 8. Next Examples to Read
docs.text:
• examples/01_helloworld: minimal setup
  • examples/02_texture: image drawing
  • examples/03_model: 3D model drawing
  • examples/04_sound: sound playback
  • examples/09_physics: physics
  • examples/14_synth: synth

For the full API, see docs/en/luau_api.md.

docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Sinen is a creative coding framework.

docs.title: Community
docs.text: Discord

docs.title: 2D Coordinates
docs.text:
2D drawing uses a top-left origin.

  • (0, 0) is the top-left of the window
  • x grows to the right
  • y grows downward
  • Rect.new(x, y, width, height) treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left
  • Graphics.drawRect and Graphics.drawImage draw from the Rect top-left
  • Graphics.drawText uses the top-left of the rendered text as position

Use the Pivot overload of Rect.new when you want to construct a rectangle from another anchor such as the center or bottom-right.

local rect = sn.Rect.new(sn.Pivot.Center, sn.Vec2.new(400, 300), sn.Vec2.new(120, 80))
sn.Graphics.drawRect(rect, sn.Color.new(1, 1, 1, 1))

2D drawing can also be scoped with an explicit Camera2D. Without begin2D, or after finish(), 2D drawing uses the window as the implicit camera.

local uiCamera = sn.Camera2D.new()
uiCamera:resize(sn.Vec2.new(1280, 720))

sn.Graphics.begin2D(uiCamera)
sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: 3D Passes
docs.text:
3D drawing is scoped by an explicit camera pass. Call Graphics.begin3D(camera), issue 3D draw calls, then call Graphics.finish() before returning to implicit 2D drawing.

local camera = sn.Camera3D.new()
camera:lookat(sn.Vec3.new(1, 1, 3), sn.Vec3.new(0), sn.Vec3.new(0, 1, 0))

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))

docs.title: Procedural 3D Models
docs.text:
sn.MeshBuilder lets Luau assemble vertices, triangles, and primitive shapes, then convert the result into a Model. The vertex ids returned by vertex() are 1-based for Luau code.

local builder = sn.MeshBuilder.new()
builder:addSphere(1.0, 16, 32, sn.Color.new(0.9, 0.4, 0.2, 1.0))

local model = builder:toModel()
local transform = sn.Transform.new()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: Immediate GUI
docs.text:
sn.Gui provides a small immediate-mode GUI layer. Call widgets every frame from draw(); each widget draws itself and returns its new interaction state.

local enabled = false
local volume = 0.5

function draw()
    if sn.Gui.button("Play", sn.Rect.new(20, 20, 120, 32)) then
        print("clicked")
    end

    enabled = sn.Gui.checkbox("Enabled", enabled, sn.Rect.new(20, 64, 160, 28))
    volume = sn.Gui.sliderFloat("Volume", volume, 0.0, 1.0, sn.Rect.new(20, 104, 240, 28))
end

For scrollable lists, keep the scroll offset in Luau and update it with the value returned by scrollVertical().

local scrollY = 0.0
local viewport = sn.Rect.new(20, 80, 360, 480)

function draw()
    scrollY = sn.Gui.scrollVertical(scrollY, viewport, 900, 48)
end

docs.title: Video API
docs.text:
sn.VideoWriter and sn.VideoReader write and read video files. The current implementation uses a simple AVI container without an external codec dependency.

local writer = sn.VideoWriter.new()
if writer:open("capture.avi", 640, 360, 30) then
    -- pixels is an RGB8/RGBA8/BGR8/BGRA8 sn.Buffer
    writer:addFrame(pixels, 640, 360, "rgba8", 90)
    writer:close()
end

local reader = sn.VideoReader.new()
if reader:open("capture.avi") then
    local info = reader:info()
    local frame = reader:readFrame(0)
    reader:close()
end

docs.title: Sinen Tutorial
docs.text: This page explains the fastest way to run a Luau app with Sinen.

docs.title: 1. Core Ideas
docs.text:
Sinen is based on three simple rules:

  • Run main.luau as the entry script
  • Split logic into setup, update, and draw
  • Place assets under the runtime base directory

2D drawing uses Processing/raylib-style coordinates. sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) is the top-left of the screen, x grows to the right, and y grows downward. sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) also treats x, y as the rectangle's top-left corner.

Here is the minimum script:

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- Move to another scene if needed
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

docs.title: Windows (this repository layout)
docs.text:
1. Build from the project root
build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat
build\build_msvc2026-debug.bat
  1. Move to your project directory and run
cd examples\01_helloworld
..\..\build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe

main.luau will be loaded.

You can also run a .sna archive. A .sna file is a zip archive whose root contains a sna/ directory with main.luau and its assets inside.

hoge.sna
└─ sna
   ├─ main.luau
   └─ logo.png

build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe hoge.sna

docs.title: Android
docs.text:
• build\generate_android.bat
  • build\build_android.bat
  • Open build/android in Android Studio and run
  • Place your assets under /sdcard/Android/media/astomih.sinen.app

docs.title: 3. Lifecycle
docs.text:
• setup(): called once when a scene is loaded; use it for loading textures/models
  • update(): called every frame; use it for input, game logic, and physics
  • draw(): called every frame for rendering

setup is optional. update and draw are enough to run.

docs.title: 4. Draw an Image
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local image: sn.Texture = sn.Texture.new()

function setup()
    image:load("logo.png")
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawImage(image, sn.Rect.new(20, 20, image:size().x, image:size().y))
end

docs.title: 5. Input and Sound
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local se: sn.Sound = sn.Sound.new()

function setup()
    se:load("shot.wav")
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.SPACE) then
        se:play()
    end
end

docs.title: 6. Scene Switching
docs.text:
Use sn.Script.load(filePath, baseDirPath) to switch scenes.

  • filePath: script name without extension (for example, main)
  • baseDirPath: base directory of that scene

Example: switch to scenes/title/main.luau

sn.Script.load("main", "scenes/title")

docs.title: 7. Example Directory Layout
docs.text:
my_game/
  main.luau
  player.luau
  logo.png
  shot.wav
  scenes/
    title/
      main.luau

For modules in the same directory, use normal require.

local Player = require("./player")

docs.title: 8. Next Examples to Read
docs.text:
• examples/01_helloworld: minimal setup
  • examples/02_texture: image drawing
  • examples/03_model: 3D model drawing
  • examples/04_sound: sound playback
  • examples/09_physics: physics
  • examples/14_synth: synth

For the full API, see docs/en/luau_api.md.

docs.title: 概要
docs.text: Sinenはクリエイティブコーディングのためのフレームワークです。

docs.title: コミュニティ
docs.text: Discord

docs.title: 2D 座標
docs.text:
2D 描画は左上原点です。

  • (0, 0) はウィンドウの左上
  • x は右方向に増加
  • y は下方向に増加
  • Rect.new(x, y, width, height) の x, y は矩形の左上
  • Graphics.drawRect / Graphics.drawImage は Rect の左上を基準に描画
  • Graphics.drawText の position は描画される文字列の左上

中心や右下など別の基準点から矩形を作りたい場合は Pivot 付きの Rect.new を使います。

local rect = sn.Rect.new(sn.Pivot.Center, sn.Vec2.new(400, 300), sn.Vec2.new(120, 80))
sn.Graphics.drawRect(rect, sn.Color.new(1, 1, 1, 1))

2D 描画も明示的な Camera2D で scoped pass にできます。begin2D を使わない場合、または finish() 後は、ウィンドウが暗黙の 2D カメラとして使われます。

local uiCamera = sn.Camera2D.new()
uiCamera:resize(sn.Vec2.new(1280, 720))

sn.Graphics.begin2D(uiCamera)
sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: 3D Pass
docs.text:
3D 描画は明示的なカメラ pass で囲みます。Graphics.begin3D(camera) の後に 3D 描画を発行し、2D の暗黙描画へ戻る前に Graphics.finish() を呼びます。

local camera = sn.Camera3D.new()
camera:lookat(sn.Vec3.new(1, 1, 3), sn.Vec3.new(0), sn.Vec3.new(0, 1, 0))

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

sn.Graphics.drawText("HUD", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20))

docs.title: プロシージャル 3D モデル
docs.text:
sn.MeshBuilder は Luau から頂点・三角形・基本形状を組み立て、Model に変換できます。vertex() が返す頂点番号は Luau 側に合わせて 1 始まりです。

local builder = sn.MeshBuilder.new()
builder:addSphere(1.0, 16, 32, sn.Color.new(0.9, 0.4, 0.2, 1.0))

local model = builder:toModel()
local transform = sn.Transform.new()

sn.Graphics.begin3D(camera)
sn.Graphics.drawModel(model, transform)
sn.Graphics.finish()

docs.title: Immediate GUI
docs.text:
sn.Gui は小さな immediate-mode GUI レイヤーです。draw() から毎フレーム widget を呼ぶと、その場で描画され、新しい入力状態が戻り値で返ります。

local enabled = false
local volume = 0.5

function draw()
    if sn.Gui.button("Play", sn.Rect.new(20, 20, 120, 32)) then
        print("clicked")
    end

    enabled = sn.Gui.checkbox("Enabled", enabled, sn.Rect.new(20, 64, 160, 28))
    volume = sn.Gui.sliderFloat("Volume", volume, 0.0, 1.0, sn.Rect.new(20, 104, 240, 28))
end

スクロールが必要な一覧では、スクロール量を Luau 側で保持し、scrollVertical() の戻り値で更新します。

local scrollY = 0.0
local viewport = sn.Rect.new(20, 80, 360, 480)

function draw()
    scrollY = sn.Gui.scrollVertical(scrollY, viewport, 900, 48)
end

docs.title: Video API
docs.text:
sn.VideoWriter と sn.VideoReader は、動画の書き出しと読み戻しに対応します。現在の実装は外部コーデックに依存しない簡易 AVI コンテナを使います。

local writer = sn.VideoWriter.new()
if writer:open("capture.avi", 640, 360, 30) then
    -- pixels は RGB8/RGBA8/BGR8/BGRA8 の sn.Buffer
    writer:addFrame(pixels, 640, 360, "rgba8", 90)
    writer:close()
end

local reader = sn.VideoReader.new()
if reader:open("capture.avi") then
    local info = reader:info()
    local frame = reader:readFrame(0)
    reader:close()
end

docs.title: Sinenチュートリアル
docs.text: このページでは、Sinen を使って Luau でアプリを動かす最短手順を説明します。

docs.title: 1. まず覚えること
docs.text:
Sinen の基本はこの3つです。

  • main.luau をエントリースクリプトとして実行する
  • setup / update / draw の3関数で処理を分ける
  • アセットは実行時のベースディレクトリ配下に置く

2D 描画の座標は Processing や raylib と同じく左上原点です。sn.Vec2.new(0, 0) は画面左上、x は右方向、y は下方向に増えます。sn.Rect.new(x, y, width, height) の x, y も矩形の左上です。

最小コードは次のとおりです。

local sn = require("@sinen")
local font: sn.Font = sn.Font.new()

function setup()
    font:load(32)
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.ESCAPE) then
        -- 必要なら別シーンへ遷移
        -- sn.Script.load("main", ".")
    end
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawText("Hello Sinen!", font, sn.Vec2.new(20, 20), sn.Color.new(1.0), 32)
end

docs.title: Windows (このリポジトリの構成)
docs.text:
1. ルートでビルド
build\generate_msvc2026-debug.bat
build\build_msvc2026-debug.bat
  1. プロジェクトディレクトリへ移動して実行
cd examples\01_helloworld
..\..\build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe

main.luau が読み込まれます。

.sna アーカイブを渡して実行することもできます。.sna は zip 形式で、 zip 直下に sna/ フォルダを置き、その中に main.luau とアセットを配置します。

hoge.sna
└─ sna
   ├─ main.luau
   └─ logo.png

build\msvc2026-debug\sinen.exe hoge.sna

docs.title: Android
docs.text:
• build\generate_android.bat
  • build\build_android.bat
  • build/android を Android Studio で開いて実行
  • アセット一式を /sdcard/Android/media/astomih.sinen.app に配置

docs.title: 3. ライフサイクル
docs.text:
• setup(): シーン読込時に1回。テクスチャやモデルのロードに使う
  • update(): 毎フレーム更新。入力・ゲームロジック・物理更新に使う
  • draw(): 毎フレーム描画

setup は省略可能です。update / draw だけでも動作します。

docs.title: 4. 画像を描く
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local image: sn.Texture = sn.Texture.new()

function setup()
    image:load("logo.png")
end

function draw()
    sn.Graphics.drawImage(image, sn.Rect.new(20, 20, image:size().x, image:size().y))
end

docs.title: 5. 入力とサウンド
docs.text:
local sn = require("@sinen")
local se: sn.Sound = sn.Sound.new()

function setup()
    se:load("shot.wav")
end

function update()
    if sn.Keyboard.isPressed(sn.Keyboard.SPACE) then
        se:play()
    end
end

docs.title: 6. シーン遷移
docs.text:
sn.Script.load(filePath, baseDirPath) で遷移できます。

  • filePath: 拡張子なしのスクリプト名（例: main）
  • baseDirPath: そのシーンの基準ディレクトリ

例: scenes/title/main.luau に遷移

sn.Script.load("main", "scenes/title")

docs.title: 7. ディレクトリ構成の例
docs.text:
my_game/
  main.luau
  player.luau
  logo.png
  shot.wav
  scenes/
    title/
      main.luau

同一ディレクトリのモジュールは通常の require で読み込めます。

local Player = require("./player")

docs.title: 8. 次に読むサンプル
docs.text:
• examples/01_helloworld: 最小構成
  • examples/02_texture: 画像表示
  • examples/03_model: 3Dモデル表示
  • examples/04_sound: サウンド再生
  • examples/09_physics: 物理
  • examples/14_synth: シンセ

API 一覧は docs/ja/luau_api.md から参照できます。
